seo.title: Wink Academy | Learn Direct Hotel Distribution
seo.metaDescription: Wink Academy teaches hotel teams, Partners, and platform builders how direct distribution, social commerce, Booking Engine paths, attribution, and AI discovery work.

cards.title: Direct distribution basics
cards.body: Understand direct booking, OTA economics, Partner demand, and the hotel relationship.

cards.title: Social commerce loop
cards.body: Learn how content, links, storefronts, checkout, attribution, and payment connect.

cards.title: AI and answer engines
cards.body: Learn how hotel content should be structured for AI discovery and bookable demand.

items.question: What is Wink Academy?
items.answer: Wink Academy is the learning route for direct hotel distribution, social commerce, Partner demand, Booking Engine conversion, and hotel-commerce technology.

items.question: Who is Academy for?
items.answer: Academy is for hotel teams, Partners, agencies, platform teams, and developers who need practical context before implementation.

items.question: Is Academy available now?
items.answer: The launch page is available now. Course inventory can be expanded as the first approved lessons are prepared.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
